title: Backend Authentication API
description: A Node.js/Express API that handles user authentication. The system contains several bugs, security vulnerabilities, and incomplete features that need to be resolved.

tasks.title: Fix Data Leak in User Profile
tasks.description: The GET /api/users/profile endpoint currently returns the user's password hash. Update the controller to omit sensitive fields.

tasks.title: Fix Password Verification
tasks.description: Users are unable to log in even with correct credentials. Fix the password comparison logic in the login controller.

tasks.title: Improve Token Validation Error Handling
tasks.description: The authentication middleware crashes the server (500 Error) when an expired JWT is provided. Update it to return a clean 401 Unauthorized response instead.

tasks.title: Include Role in JWT Payload
tasks.description: The login token generation is missing the user's role. Ensure the role is included in the JWT payload so the frontend can read it.

tasks.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
tasks.description: The GET /api/admin/dashboard endpoint is currently accessible by any authenticated user. Implement a middleware to restrict access only to users with the 'ADMIN' role.

tasks.title: Implement Token Refresh
tasks.description: Implement the POST /api/auth/refresh endpoint to issue a new access token when provided with a valid refresh token.
